query:
-- First, get the user's email (assuming you're logged in)
-- Then create a test enrollment with Orange Belt rank

INSERT INTO enrollments (
  membershipPackageId,
  customerName,
  customerEmail,
  customerPhone,
  downPaymentAmount,
  remainingBalance,
  monthlyPaymentsRemaining,
  status,
  beltRank,
  beltAchievedDate,
  startDate,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  1,
  'Test Student',
  'test@example.com',
  '555-0123',
  100.00,
  0.00,
  0,
  'active',
  'Orange Belt',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  beltRank = 'Orange Belt',
  beltAchievedDate = NOW();
